commands.review_summary:
The PR adds pre-normalization runtime tool-schema quarantine for assistant attempts, compaction, quarantine diagnostics, doctor runtime findings, and focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +346, Tests +413. Total +759 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current-main source shows active tools are normalized before final schema projection, while the old projection reads tool names and parameters without guards; the PR's focused tests exercise that failure path, though I did not run tests in this read-only pass.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A narrow automated repair can preserve quarantined active tool names before bundled tool materialization, after which maintainers still need to accept the compatibility behavior.

target.title: fix(agents): quarantine invalid runtime tool schemas
target.body:
## Summary

- Quarantines invalid/unserializable runtime tool schemas before provider/model startup so one bad active tool does not crash the assistant turn before content.
- Applies the same quarantine shape to compaction/runtime tool paths and preserves readable healthy sibling tools.
- Keeps omitted tool names reserved so MCP/LSP/bundled tools cannot reintroduce a quarantined name through later runtime construction.

## Verification

- Rebased branch onto current `origin/main`; pushed head `528a87087a5024b77493d4e7e666f688d417a4b6`.
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts`: passed, 3 routed shards / 163 tests.
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-files.txt)`: passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-files.txt)`: passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`: passed.
- `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`: selected `core` and `coreTests`.
- `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`: selected `core` and `coreTests`.
- Touched-file scrub found no reported private plugin/tool name or private path/network literals.
- Broad local routed attempt note: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-files.txt)` failed in unrelated agents shards outside this PR's diff (`@earendil-works/pi-ai` missing from local dist-backed optional package resolution; `src/agents/tools/sessions-spawn-tool.test.ts` current-main auth expectation failures). The changed test files above passed directly.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: invalid active tool schemas are filtered and logged before provider normalization/model startup, and healthy sibling tools continue to run.

Real environment tested: local linked gwt worktree with focused changed-file runtime/doctor/compaction tests.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/compact.hooks.test.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.spawn-workspace.context-engine.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-projection.test.ts src/agents/tool-schema-quarantine.test.ts src/flows/doctor-core-checks.runtime.test.ts`; `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-files.txt)`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs $(cat /tmp/runtime-quarantine-files.txt)`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/changed-lanes.mjs --json`; `node scripts/check-changed.mjs --dry-run`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests cover provider-normalizable filtering, quarantine logging, readable tool-name handling, compaction schema quarantine, and doctor/runtime warning paths.

Observed result after fix: focused changed test files, formatting, lint, diff check, and lane dry-run passed after the latest rebase/push.

What was not tested: no clean broad `pnpm check:changed` run after the rebase; the broad local routed attempt hit unrelated current-worktree/main failures outside this PR's diff.
